description: A designed graphic with a dark brick-wall background. A white instant-photo frame holds a booking-style portrait of a man with short dark hair against a height chart, captioned 'CHILD SEXUAL ASSAULT' in handwriting-style text. Below is a 'Worst of the Worst' logo with a 'Houston' label and an ICE logo.
notable_text: CHILD SEXUAL ASSAULT; Worst of the Worst; Houston; ICE
